build.buildCommand: npm install && npm run build && curl -fsSL https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/releases/latest/download/yt-dlp -o /usr/local/bin/yt-dlp && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/yt-dlp && echo "yt-dlp installed:" && yt-dlp --version && apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends libglib2.0-0 libnss3 libnspr4 libatk1.0-0 libatk-bridge2.0-0 libcups2 libdrm2 libdbus-1-3 libexpat1 libxcb1 libxkbcommon0 libx11-6 libxcomposite1 libxdamage1 libxext6 libxfixes3 libxrandr2 libgbm1 libpango-1.0-0 libcairo2 libasound2 libx11-xcb1 libxshmfence1 && npx playwright install chromium && echo "Playwright Chromium installed"
